pageContext.name: The Hierophant 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: The Hierophant features on this 1oz pure silver Tarot Card Coin - the sixth release in this popular Collection. This card is about exploring other ways of thinking that will prompt further learning, ultimately leading you to uncover your personal truths.  This unique 1oz pure silver coin has been colored, engraved, and shaped to mirror a Tarot card. The obverse of the coin has a striking engraved border around the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II.   It arrives inside attractive, custom-made packaging which opens like a book to reveal the coin inside. A Certificate of Authenticity is printed beneath the coin, confirming it as legal tender in Niue, along with the coin's unique number in the mintage of just 2,000. Printed on the inside front cover is the meaning behind the card.   Add this special coin to your collection today!
